description:
Located in Riegelwood, this 7.02-acre vacant lot offers a strong opportunity for buyers seeking space, privacy, and a peaceful rural setting in southeastern North Carolina. The property is level and has access to electricity, with a well and septic system needed, giving buyers a practical starting point for a future homesite, recreational retreat, or long-term land investment. Its wooded setting and deeper layout can create a more private, tucked-away feel, especially for buyers who want separation from the main road and room to shape the land around their plans.

This property may appeal to those looking for a custom home site, weekend getaway, outdoor recreation space, small homestead concept, or private retreat, subject to county approvals and site evaluation. The natural surroundings offer potential for trails, wildlife watching, and quiet outdoor enjoyment, while the acreage provides flexibility that smaller lots cannot offer. If access is provided by easement, buyers should verify the easement location, access rights, maintenance responsibilities, and any improvement requirements.

Riegelwood offers a relaxed rural atmosphere while still being within reach of everyday needs, regional employers, and larger service hubs. The area benefits from economic activity tied to agriculture, forestry, manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, education, retail, and nearby port-related industries. Buyers can enjoy small-town living with access to schools, local services, parks, and outdoor recreation, while being within driving distance of Whiteville, Wilmington, Leland, and Fayetteville. Wilmington, in particular, adds access to coastal amenities, major shopping, dining, healthcare, higher education, airport service, and employment opportunities.

With 7.02 acres of level land, available electricity, and a quiet natural setting, this Riegelwood property offers the kind of space and privacy many buyers are looking for in a rural North Carolina homesite or investment tract. Buyer to verify zoning, utilities, easement/access, well and septic requirements, soil suitability, floodplain/wetland considerations, permitted uses, and buildability.

Renovated and truly move-in ready! This 3-bedroom, 2-bath home at 2403 Spivey Avenue sits on a spacious lot, offering plenty of outdoor space for parking, play, and entertaining! Inside, everything feels brand new from the roof to the updated kitchen and stylish bathrooms giving you modern comfort and peace of mind. The location is ideal with quick access to Savannah/Hilton Head Airport, Gulfstream, the Port of Savannah, and nearby shopping and dining, making daily commutes and errands fast and convenient. Schedule your appointment to see your future home!

INVESTORS SPECIAL - No Land Will Convey - Cash or Owners Financing Only - Land Lease Required Minimum 1 year.  
~~  1992 Gateway Homes Cascade Economy II Mobile Home spanning 14x70 and 980 square foot with 2 Bedrooms and 2 Bathrooms - Key features include Kitchen with Bar, Large Living Room area, and Dedicated Laundry Room space. Recent updates include new carpet and newer floors, new range, new refrigerator, and newer heat pump.
~~ CASH or OWNER FINANCE SALE ONLY - Only mobile home transfers to new owner. Lot does not convey. New owner will sign a Lot Lease with a 1 year Minimum.  Mobile Home CAN NOT be moved during the first year or until Paid off if Owner Financing.
~~ Land Lease is 400 per month that includes Garbage, Sewer, and Grass Cutting.
~~ Owner Finance Available with 20 percent down and monthly payments of 1,000 which does not include the land lease.

Residential Estate Lot available in McConnell Run - Lot 24.  This tract is 2.67 acres in total size - with approved homesite, approved septic permit, and site design that keeps you off the wetlands and flood zone with room for your new home.  Beautiful hardwoods through the tract of land that borders the Greenbrier Creek.  This community does not have a HOA or HOA Fees, but does have restrictive covenants in place that require no mobile homes and homes must be 2600 sq ft minimum.  Electric, Water, Internet & Phone available at the road, will need septic tank for sewer (perc test / soil survey / approve septic permit design for lot available)

Great Acreage ready for your next Lake Home in the beautiful area of the lake in Catfish Bay!!  Lot 2 is 2.32 acres in size that backs to the Catfish Bay Boat Ramp area.  This lot has public water, electric, phone, and fiber internet.  It will require a septic tank for sewer. This lake community features NO HOA or Covenants & Restrictions!!  The Catfish Bay area of the lake is such a beautiful area offering endless recreational potential right at your doorsteps!!  Come and see this beautiful lot ready to make it your lake home paradise!!  Looking for additional acreage - Lot 1 is available as well to make a huge estate like homesite.

MOVE-IN READY! Come tour 1520 Stone Wood Drive! One of our new homes at Ridgewood Farms, located in Winterville, NC.

The Penwell is one of our two-story plans featured at Ridgewood Farms in Winterville, North Carolina offering 3 modern elevations and boast an impressive level of comfort, luxury, and style. This Penwell Floor Plan offers 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and 2175 sq. ft. of impeccable living space. 

Upon entering the home, you'll be greeted by a foyer which invites that leads directly into the center of the home. At the heart of the home is a spacious great room that blends with the kitchen, creating an expansive and airy feel. The kitchen is well equipped with a walk-in pantry, stainless steel appliances, and breakfast bar, perfect for cooking and entertaining. There is also a flex room on the first floor that can be used as a home office, fitness room, or craft room.

The primary bedroom features a walk-in closet and en-suite bathroom with dual vanities. The additional two bedrooms provide comfort and privacy and have access to a secondary bathroom. The loft offers a flexible space that can be used as a media room, playroom, or a fourth bedroom. The laundry room completes the second floor.

With its thoughtful design, spacious layout, and modern conveniences, the Penwell is the perfect new home for you at Ridgewood Farms.

Quality craftsmanship, a 1-year builder's warranty, and a central location make this an ideal choice. Schedule a tour today. 

Make the Penwell your new home at Ridgewood Farms today!  *Photos are not of actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only. *

Welcome to 1031 Martin Farms Boulevard in Martin Farms, located in Aberdeen, NC! 

The Lawson is one of our two-story floorplans offering 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, 2,896 sq. ft. of living space, and a 2-car garage.

Located close to Southern Pines, Aberdeen Lake Park, Pinehurst, FirstHealth Moore Regional Hospital, and Center Park Shopping Center, The Manors at Martin Farms provides the perfect balance of affordability and accessibility. Grocery stores, restaurants, shopping, and entertainment are just a short drive away, providing the convenience today's homeowners are looking for.

The Manors at Martin Farms is a thoughtfully planned new home community in Aberdeen, designed to support modern lifestyles. Residents will enjoy a community pool, clubhouse and open spaces. Residents can also take a leisurely walk on the paved sidewalks that wind through the community.

New homes in The Manors at Martin Farms are thoughtfully designed floorplans to fit a variety of lifestyles. Plans feature four to five bedrooms, three to four bathrooms, one to two-story, and offer options that include flex rooms, lofts, and open living spaces. The open floor plan designs are perfect for entertaining, while the LED lighting adds a modern touch and creates a warm, inviting ambiance. Kitchens with quartz countertops, ceramic tile backsplashes, and stainless-steel appliances create a clean and functional space for cooking, gathering, or entertaining friends.

With stylish homes, flexible floor plans, and a convenient location, The Manors at Martin Farms offers new homes in Aberdeen designed for the way people live today - a place where homeowners can settle in, create memories, and enjoy the comfort of a thoughtfully designed community. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make it your own. Schedule a tour today!

*Photos are not of the actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only*

Charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath home located on a quiet cul-de-sac in the gated community of Seven Lakes North. Nestled on nearly a half-acre lot with mature trees, this home features a formal dining room, a spacious living area, and a bright kitchen with an eat-in breakfast nook, bay window, and built-in seating. The split bedroom floor plan offers a private primary suite with two closets, a soaking tub, and a separate shower, with two additional bedrooms on the opposite side of the home. A versatile bonus room sits above the garage, perfect for a home office or hobby space. Enjoy peaceful outdoor living on the large back deck overlooking the wooded backyard. New carpet has recently been installed!

Move-In Ready! The Beaufort Plan by PlanDwell Homes is a charming ranch-style residence offering 1,771 heated square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, including three spacious bedrooms and two full baths. Start your mornings and unwind in the evenings on the inviting covered front and back porches.
Inside, the open-concept layout welcomes you with a light-filled great room featuring a cozy fireplace, seamlessly flowing into the dining area—ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The stylish kitchen is equipped with granite countertops, a tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and ample prep space to inspire your culinary creativity. The owner's suite provides a private retreat, complete with a spa-inspired en suite bath, dual vanities, and a generously sized walk-in closet. Located in The Sanctuary, residents enjoy a relaxed, community-focused lifestyle with sidewalks, streetlights, a large community garden, and a scenic walking trail. All of this is just minutes from Downtown Aiken, Bruce's Field, Hitchcock Woods, premier equestrian venues, shopping, and fine dining.

Welcome to 223 Pisgah Street at Galvins Ridge in Sanford, NC!

The Hayden is a two-story plan with 5 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms in 2,511 square feet. The main level features a flex room adjacent to the foyer, ideal for a formal dining room or home office. The gourmet kitchen has an oversized island for extra seating and a large pantry, and it opens to the dining area and a spacious living room. A bedroom with a full bathroom completes the main level. The primary suite on the second level offers a luxurious primary bath with a separate shower, private bathroom, double vanities, and a large walk-in closet. There are 3 additional bedrooms, a full bathroom, a walk-in laundry room, and a loft-style living room on the second level. Smart home package included.

Galvins Ridge is located in the booming Sanford, North Carolina! This thoughtfully designed master-planned community will feature a wide array of single-family and gathering spaces throughout the community to stay connected with friends and family. Planned amenities include a: pool, clubhouse, outdoor courts, paved walking trails, dog parks, a fishing pond, and more! It is conveniently located off Highway 1 within 10 minutes of major area employers in Central Carolina Enterprise Park and Triangle Innovation Point including Pfizer,
Caterpillar, Astellas, and Vinfast. Our community is 15 minutes from 540, 20 minutes from Holly Springs Towne Center, 35 minutes from Raleigh, 35 minutes from RTP, 45 minutes to Fort Bragg, and minutes from historic downtown Sanford with plenty of shopping and dining! Only 15 mins to Highway 540, 18 mins to Apex, 20 mins to Holly Springs Towne Center. 

*Photos are not of the actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only*

Seller offering $7500 toward closing costs!! Charming 3BR/2.5BA home in Chapel Park at Berwick Plantation. This 1,908 Sq ft, two-story residence, built in 2009, offers an open-concept downstairs, including dining area, living area, updated kitchen with breakfast bar, and a 1/2 bath for guests. Upstairs you will find a loft area that can be used as a flex space (Office, den or playroom). In addition, you will find a primary suite with soaking tub and separate shower, dual sinks and walk in closet.  There are 2 additional bedrooms upstairs, as well as a full bath and laundry room. Features include a fenced in backyard backing up to a lagoon, 2-car garage with an insulated door and bluetooth garage door opener that you can open from your phone. The home has also recently been updated with Luxury Vinyl Plank throughout. Enjoy community amenities like pool, clubhouse, and playground in this convenient West Chatham location. This beautiful home is move-in ready and low-maintenance living!

Your Home Search Ends Here! Resting on a large corner lot and boasting over 3000sqft, this beautiful home is exactly what youve been looking for. Upon entering you are immediately greeted by a red brick foyer and new beautiful wood grained floors throughout the downstairs. A flex room to the left perfect for a workout space, office, or play room flowing directly into your newly updated kitchen complete with upgraded appliances, new cabinetry, brand  new quartz countertops, and kitchen island. Continuing around through the open layout youll find yourself in your cozy living room centered around a beautiful brick fireplace with built in bookshelves. Walking back through towards the front door youll find your spacious dining room flooded with natural light. A massive laundry room/office space and half bath rounds out the downstairs. Upstairs youll find three bedrooms with brand new carpeting and shared bathroom. Continuing around youll find yourself in your master suite complete with new carpeting, two closets, and master bath. Outback is where the magic happens in your own private oasis. An absolutely massive screened in porch leads into the beautifully landscaped backyard complete with fire pit, green house, and your own private pool perfect for a cool swim or just relaxing the day away! All of this and conveniently located a short drive from shopping, parks, and all of the entertainment Savannah has to offer!

address: 0 1 Governor Aycock Road NE, Fremont, NC 27830
description:
20.4 Acres with Utilities, Soil Test Completed + Flat, Build-Friendly Land in Fremont! Welcome to 0 Governor Aycock Rd (Lot 1), Fremont, NC 27830-7707, a rare opportunity to own 20.4 acres of mostly flat, usable land with the perfect blend of open cleared space and wooded privacy. This tract already has electric and public water hookups available, and a septic system will be needed, giving you flexibility to design the home, farm, or recreational retreat you've been dreaming of. A soil test has already been completed with 4 bedroom Approval , and there is a building permit on file, adding even more value and convenience for your future plans. Buyer to verify zoning, septic suitability, permit details, and intended use.

One of the best features here is the location, peaceful country living without being far from major conveniences and job hubs. You're approximately 14 minutes to Goldsboro and roughly 17 minutes to Wilson, making shopping, restaurants, hospitals, and everyday essentials an easy drive away. Raleigh and the Triangle are also within about an hour, keeping you connected to a larger metro area while still enjoying wide-open space.

Fremont offers that classic small-town North Carolina charm, but you're surrounded by real economic momentum. Nearby Goldsboro is home to major employers like Seymour Johnson Air Force Base and UNC Health Wayne, plus a strong regional foundation of agriculture and manufacturing that continues to support long-term growth.

And when it's time to unwind, you're close to outdoor recreation and weekend adventures, including North Carolina's coast. Enjoy easy getaways to the Crystal Coast, with Atlantic Beach coming in at around 2 hours and 10 minutes away, perfect for day trips, fishing, and beach weekends whenever you want a change of scenery.

If you've been looking for a large, buildable tract with utilities in place, a completed soil test, a building permit on file, a flat layout, and a prime Eastern NC location, this is the one. Come walk the land and bring your vision to life!

Back on the market at no fault of the sellers.

Welcome to 360 Hartfield Avenue at Shahbain Reserve located in Raeford, NC!  

The Galen is a spacious two-story home which boasts 2,340 sq. ft. of living space, 3 bedrooms, Loft, 2.5 bathrooms, and a 2-car garage.

The moment you step inside the home you will be greeted by the foyer which connects you first past the flex room, and then past the powder room and a storage closet. The foyer then opens into the large great room, overlooked by the kitchen. The open-concept layout integrates the great room with the kitchen, featuring stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, a spacious center island, and a corner walk-in pantry.

Upstairs, there is the primary bedroom with a private bathroom, dual vanity, and a separate water closet for privacy. The primary bedroom sits at the front of the home on this floor and features a walk-in closet. The additional two bedrooms provide comfort and privacy with access to a full secondary bathroom.  The loft and laundry room completes the second floor.

With its thoughtful design and spacious layout, the Galen is the perfect place to call home.

Future community amenities that homeowners can anticipate include a playground, pavilion, and sports courts.

Residents will be able to enjoy easy access to an abundance of shopping, dining, entertainment, and recreation options with Downtown Raeford only 8.4 miles away, and Fayetteville just 15 miles away.

*Pictures are for representational purposes only*

Welcome to Adair Park, one of Leland's most sought-after communities, known for its charming sidewalk-lined streets and prime location in the heart of town. This well-maintained home offers low-maintenance vinyl siding, a two-car garage, additional driveway spot, full gutter system, and a private fenced backyard with a peaceful tree-lined buffer for added privacy. Step inside to find a versatile flex space just off the entryway--currently used as a bedroom, but also ideal for a home office or playroom. The main living area opens up to a bright and inviting kitchen and living room, featuring durable laminate flooring and tasteful lighting, expansive granite countertops with subway tile backsplash, stylish shaker cabinetry, and a convenient pantry. The living room serves as a true focal point with its modern fireplace and custom wood open shelving. Just off the kitchen, a thoughtfully placed sunroom provides the perfect spot to enjoy your morning coffee or unwind with natural light year-round. The first-floor primary suite offers comfort and convenience, complete with an ensuite bath featuring a double vanity, tiled flooring, and shower. Upstairs, you'll find two additional bedrooms, a full bathroom located at the end of the hall, and an oversized loft that offers flexible space for a media room, office, or play area. Residents of Adair Park enjoy access to a community pool and the benefit of being just minutes from shopping, dining, grocery stores, and only a quick 10-minute drive to downtown Wilmington. This home blends comfort, style, and convenience--an ideal opportunity to enjoy the best of Leland living.

Come tour 110 Claude Street! One of our new homes at Blair Ridge, located in La Grange, NC.   

Welcome to this beautifully designed 4-bedroom, 2-bath ranch home in Blair Ridge. The Cali perfectly blends modern elegance with comfortable living! 

As you step inside, you'll be greeted with luxury vinyl flooring, providing both style and durability. The inviting layout flows seamlessly, featuring a gourmet kitchen accented with stunning granite countertops and a large island. Equipped with high-end Whirlpool appliances, and plenty of storage space, this kitchen is ideal for culinary enthusiasts. Each of the four bedrooms boasts plush carpet, creating cozy retreats for relaxation. The bathrooms are thoughtfully designed, showcasing exquisite quartz countertops that add a touch of sophistication. 

Step outside to a charming, covered patio, perfect for enjoying morning coffee or entertaining friends and family. With energy-efficient LED lighting throughout, this home not only offers beauty but also practicality. 

This home also includes a smart home package, allowing you to control lighting, climate, and security with ease. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, technology, and style in this remarkable property-your dream home awaits! 

Blair Ridge is 12 minutes from Kinston and 15 minutes from Berkeley Blvd in Goldsboro. An hour from Raleigh, and 1.5 hours from the beach.

Make the Cali your new home at Blair Ridge today!  * Photos are not of actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only. *

Build your dream home on this beautiful pond-front lot in the gated Woodlake community! Offering approximately 0.21 acres, this property provides a peaceful setting with serene water views and the added convenience of water and sewer access.

Lake front lot located on a cul-de-sac street in Edenton Bay Plantation. This spacious home site is located in a gated, water access neighborhood located approximately 5 minutes from Historic Edenton or The Links at Mulberry Hill with golf, tennis and a sound side pool. A public boat ramp is located less than 5 minutes away as well. The neighborhood offers numerous open spaces plus a pier to take in vacation worthy sunsets.
Covenants for minimum sqft for new build are different for Mallard Cove section.  See RC's.  Also, special assessment one time per year per lot for owners of pond front properties.  Approximately $115-$120/year for electric (pond pump/fountain).

Welcome to 610 Wilder Bloom Path at Martin Farms Townes located in the heart of the booming Aberdeen, NC!

Martin Farms is a beautiful masterplan community that offers many luxuries to those that live here. This community will feature a pool, clubhouse, sidewalks, and open space. Martin Farms also provides remarkable convenience to work, shopping, and dining with its prime location off US-1 and NC 5. 

Welcome to the Pearson townhome! As you step inside this 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhome you'll discover 1,418 square feet of comfortable living space. The first floor living area is designed with an open-concept layout, seamlessly connecting the kitchen, living, and dining areas for a versatile space ideal for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen is absolutely stunning, with sleek stainless-steel appliances, quartz countertops, and elegant cabinetry. It is the perfect space for cooking up delicious meals and entertaining friends and family. The living and dining area is conveniently located nearby, keeping you close to the action. Finishing off the main floor is a lovely patio in the back, where you can relax and enjoy some fresh air!

Elevate your living experience with the second-floor's versatile rooms. Whether you need extra bedrooms, functional offices, or additional bonus spaces, this floor has it all. Indulge in the comfort of carpeted floors and spacious closets in every bedroom. As well as the conveniently located laundry area in the hallway makes chores a breeze. The primary bedroom has its own attached bathroom, featuring a 5' walk-in shower with a clear glass door, a double-bowl vanity with quartz countertops, and a spacious walk-in closet. 

Quality materials and workmanship throughout, with superior attention to detail, plus a 1-year builder's warranty and 10-year structural warranty. Smart Home Package included!

Make the Pearson at Martin Farms your new home today! *Pictures are for representative purposes only. *

Looking for a land in the country to build your new home? Check out this property on Beasley Rd Roper, NC. Lot 10 is 5.01 acres +/- with 240' of road frontage. Nice combination of cleared and woods land. Deed restrictions to be: single family, no manufactured homes (single or doublewides or campers as dwellings), tiny homes, barn homes, modular or site built homes ok. All county rules apply too (including limit on number of dogs & contained to owners yard). No storage of inoperable vehicles or motor craft. Buyer would be responsible to add a well and septic. Please do not drive on farm.

Come tour 10739 Beard Way! One of our new homes at Beaver Dam Crossing, located in Bailey, NC.

Welcome to the Salem, one of our two-story floorplans in Beaver Dam Crossing, located in Bailey, North Carolina, offering 4 modern elevations. This home features 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, 2,632 sq. ft. of living space, and a 2-car garage.

Set in the heart of Hendersonville, this 0.18-acre vacant lot on 1st Ave W offers a valuable opportunity for buyers looking to build in a convenient and established city setting. The property is level and has access to electricity, public water, and public sewer, giving future owners a strong starting point for a custom home, in-town residence, or long-term investment. With utilities available and a manageable lot size, this property is well-suited for buyers who want everyday convenience without taking on more land than they need.

The location is one of the strongest selling points. Hendersonville is known for its charming downtown, local shops, restaurants, parks, seasonal events, and welcoming mountain-town atmosphere. Buyers can enjoy close access to grocery stores, schools, medical services, recreation, and community amenities while still being surrounded by the natural beauty of Western North Carolina.

From an economic standpoint, Hendersonville and Henderson County offer a strong mix of job opportunities in healthcare, education, tourism, hospitality, retail, manufacturing, professional services, and local government. The area also benefits from its proximity to larger employment centers in Asheville, Fletcher, Arden, and the greater Greenville-Spartanburg region.

For outdoor and lifestyle appeal, buyers will appreciate being near the Blue Ridge Mountains, local apple orchards, wineries, hiking areas, parks, and scenic drives. Downtown Hendersonville, Asheville, and nearby mountain communities provide shopping, dining, entertainment, and cultural attractions within an easy drive.

For buyers seeking a level in-town lot with public utilities available, convenient access to daily amenities, and the charm of a growing Western North Carolina community, this 1st Ave W property offers a practical and appealing opportunity. Buyer to verify buildability, zoning, setbacks, permits, utility connections, and intended use with the proper authorities.

Come tour 317 Wellspring Drive! One of our new homes at Hunter Hill, located in Rocky Mount, NC.

With its thoughtful design, expansive layout, and modern features, the Elston at Hunter Hill is the perfect place to call home. * Photos are not of actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only. *

address: 219 Fair Child Road, Spring Lake, NC 28390
description:
Welcome to 219 Fair Child Road at Mason Ridge located in tranquil Spring Lake, NC.  This home features a tree-lined private lot, crawl space and deck for outdoor entertaining!

Introducing the Wilmington floorplan. One of our most sought-after homes featuring 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, a 2-car garage, and 2,824 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space. This home features a crawl space and deck for entertaining.

The moment you step inside the home you will be greeted by the foyer which connects you first to a home office with elegant double French doors, leading to a formal dining room which offers ample space for entertaining with family and friends. The foyer then leads into the center of the home. The open-concept layout integrates the main living area, a beautiful kitchen, and a cozy breakfast area opening to an outdoor patio. The gourmet kitchen features beautiful stainless-steel appliances, a big center island, ample cabinets, and quartz countertops, making a chef's dream. 

Upstairs, there is a spacious primary suite with private bathroom and large walk-in closet. The additional three bedrooms all include walk-in closets, built with comfort. The Wilmington includes versatile loft area that can be a media room, playroom, or home gym.

With its luxurious design and ample space, the Wilmington is the perfect place to call home.

Look no further for the perfect location, as Mason Ridge enjoys a tranquil setting just southwest of Wake County. Less than 30 minutes from both Fort Bragg and Cape Fear Hospital.

Do not miss this opportunity to make the Wilmington yours at Mason Ridge!

*Photos are not of the actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only*

RIDGE ROAD, APPLING LAND!! Are you looking for land in one of the premier areas of our lake -- Ridge Road?? Then you must check out this beautiful 6.65 Acre Residential Lot. There are various different building sites on the front of the track and middle back of the tract that would make for great building sites. The land rolls throughout the tract and has a small run off stream on the right hand side of the property. There are tons of various hardwoods throughout the property. There is electricity, cable, phone, internet, and county water available at the road. But you will need a septic tank for sewer - and soil survey / perc test has already been completed. The Ridge Road area is such a pretty part of the lake and makes recreational activities truly convenient plus still in Columbia County with the great school and close proximity to shopping and events.

address: 242 Lake Tyler Drive, New Bern, NC 28560
description:
Come tour 242 Lake Tyler Drive! One of our new homes at Tyler - Home on the Lake, located in New Bern, NC. 

 Welcome to Tyler Home on The Lake, discover modern living with a dash of charm in this new Mills Floorplan 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home, nestled comfortably in the heart of a friendly neighborhood. description: In the heart of historic Downtown Farmville, where church bells mingle with the hum of local cafés and the glow of gallery windows lights the sidewalks at dusk, there sits a home that feels as though it was whispered out of a fairytale. Just a short stroll from shops, restaurants, the theatre, and all the charm of Main Street, this storybook Tudor-style home welcomes you with its timeless lines and cottage-like presence. Step inside, and the story unfolds. The living room, warm and inviting, is anchored by a classic fireplace. From here, sunlight pours into the cheerful sunroom, a space that feels tailor-made for morning coffee, reading nooks, or afternoon daydreams. The well appointed kitchen and formal dining room are next on your tour.On the main level, you'll find two comfortable bedrooms, thoughtfully separated for privacy. Upstairs, two additional bedrooms offer cozy retreats, and a fifth, smaller bedroom waits to become whatever your story calls for—a nursery, hobby room, home office, or playroom. A practical mudroom entrance at the back, set beside the laundry closet, opens to the home's enchanting outdoor space. A large shady tree spreads its canopy over an expansive patio, perfect for gatherings or quiet relaxation. Beyond the patio, the yard stretches toward a detached storage building, ideal for tools or projects. But the home's most delightful secret is the large detached carport with its very own walk-up attic, offering an abundance of storage, an unexpected treasure tucked neatly onto the property. Filled with charm, character, and walkable convenience, this downtown Farmville gem blends storybook appeal with everyday livability. It's not just a house, it's a place where your next chapter begins.

Voted ''Best Town You've Never Heard Of'' by Southern Living, historic downtown Washington is one of coastal North Carolina's most charming hidden gems and this beautiful townhome-style 3BR/3BA places you in the heart of it all, with captivating views of the Pamlico River and marina.
Imagine mornings on your private balcony as the sun rises over the water in the distance and evenings unwinding as boats drift through the marina under golden skies. This is waterview living designed to be experienced, not maintained.
Inside, natural light fills the open-concept layout, creating a space that feels both elegant and inviting. The kitchen features granite countertops, tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances and a breakfast bar perfect for gathering. The living and dining areas flow seamlessly to a covered second-story porch where the water views become your everyday backdrop.
Thoughtfully designed across three levels, the home includes a main-level guest ensuite for privacy and convience. The third-floor primary suite is a true retreat with sitting area, private waterview balcony, spacious walk-in closet and spa-style bath with soaking tub and tiled shower. A second upstairs bedroom also enjoys its own full bath and private porch overlooking the marina.

The ground-level bonus room adapts to your lifestyle as a home office, media room, gym or potential fourth bedroom. A two-car garage and pre-installed elevator shaft add convenience and future-ready accessibility.

Steps from the waterfront boardwalk, boutique shops, restaurants and live music, this location captures the very best of coastal downtown living. Boating enthusiasts will appreciate nearby slips available for rent or purchase, along with a convenient kayak launch for morning paddles.
No flood insurance required. HOA covers exterior maintenance, including roof and homeowners insurance, giving you the freedom to enjoy the view without the upkeep.
This isn't just a home. It's a lifestyle.

Build-ready opportunity in a convenient Goldsboro location! 307 Longview Dr is a 0.46-acre, mostly level lot that offers an easy, practical canvas for a custom homesite. A septic system will be required, giving you flexibility in placement and layout as you design your build. With nearly a half acre, you'll have room for a comfortable home footprint plus yard space for a patio, garden, play area, or even a small workshop/storage building (buyer to verify permitted uses).

Goldsboro is a strong hub in Eastern North Carolina, known for steady job activity and ongoing growth—anchored by Seymour Johnson Air Force Base and supported by healthcare, education, retail, and regional industry. That mix helps keep the area resilient and attractive for both homeowners and investors. You'll also enjoy the lifestyle side of town: parks, recreation options, youth sports, and community events, along with convenient access to shopping, dining, and everyday services.

Goldsboro's story runs deep, with roots tied to the railroad era and a long-standing role as a regional center in Wayne County—giving the community a distinct identity, local pride, and a downtown that continues to evolve. And when you want larger-city amenities, you're within reach of Raleigh/Research Triangle, plus easy day trips to Wilson, Greenville, and Fayetteville for additional dining, universities, medical centers, and entertainment. Bring your builder, walk the lot, and picture what you can create here—level topography, utilities nearby, and a convenient Goldsboro setting Makes this one worth a look.

Tucked away in Robeson County, Angie Dr in Parkton, NC offers 34± acres of true Carolina outdoors--ideal for hunting, hiking, and recreational use, with the added bonus of natural beauty and privacy you just can't duplicate on smaller tracts. Buckhorn Swamp runs directly through the property, creating a rich habitat corridor that attracts wildlife and gives this land a rugged, authentic feel--perfect for sportsmen and nature lovers alike.

With a mix of higher ground and wetland influence, this tract also presents potential for a private, tucked-away homesite or a small ''family compound'' style setup for a buyer who wants space, seclusion, and room to roam. Due to the wetland characteristics, an unconventional septic system may be required, making it a great fit for someone ready to do the proper site work and build on their own timeline.

Location adds real convenience. You're positioned near a main corridor, so access is easy, and day-to-day amenities are close by. Parkton is a small-town community with deep roots in railroad history and the growth of Robeson County, offering that slower pace of life many buyers are chasing. For work and economic opportunity, the broader region benefits from employment tied to manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, education, and public service, with larger job markets within reach in Fayetteville and the Lumberton area. When you want bigger-city conveniences--shopping, dining, medical, and entertainment--you're also within a reasonable drive to Fayetteville and the greater Raleigh/Durham metro for expanded opportunities.

If you're looking for acreage that can serve as a recreational retreat today and a private homesite vision tomorrow, this Parkton tract is the kind of land that's getting harder to find. Come walk the property, explore the swamp run, and imagine the possibilities--your next adventure starts here.

Located just steps from the Jefferson square, 107 Church Street offers a rare opportunity to experience walkable downtown living wrapped in timeless Southern charm and historic significance. Built in 1922, this beautifully preserved American Foursquare with Colonial Revival detailing blends enduring craftsmanship with thoughtful modern updates, creating a home that feels both storied and effortlessly livable. Original hardwood floors, fireplaces, and classic architectural details set a warm, inviting tone throughout, while the gourmet kitchen anchors the home—perfect for quiet evenings with a glass of wine and music playing softly or for preparing meals while family and friends gather. The main residence features four spacious bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, providing private retreats for family and guests, along with a full bathroom on the main level for everyday convenience and entertaining. Outside, a private, solid brick, French-inspired courtyard creates a secure and serene outdoor oasis where children can play freely, summer dinners stretch long into the evening, and holiday celebrations come to life. The outdoor kitchen and living area make hosting seamless, whether for intimate gatherings or large celebrations like a Fourth of July party under the stars. Beyond the courtyard sits a charming carriage house offering a two-car garage and a fully finished upper-level apartment complete with an additional bedroom and full bathroom, ideal for guests, extended family, a private home office, or income potential. Living on Church Street means being connected to the heart of Jefferson—walk to schools, restaurants, churches, local events, and the historic square—while enjoying the privacy and comfort of a legacy property that has been lovingly stewarded for generations. This is more than a home; it is a lifestyle defined by history, community, and the ease of downtown living.

With access to electricity and public water already available, plus septic needed, this vacant parcel is well-suited for a custom homesite, private estate, recreational retreat, or homestead-style setup. The unique layout gives the property a more tucked-away feel, creating natural separation from nearby homes and allowing buyers to enjoy a sense of privacy while still maintaining convenient access. Rather than a typical cookie-cutter lot, this tract offers room to spread out and create something truly special.

Located in a good neighborhood in Goldsboro, this property benefits from being in one of Eastern North Carolina's key trade and service centers for Wayne County, with access to shopping, dining, healthcare, education, and everyday conveniences. Goldsboro also offers a strong mix of local amenities, with revitalized downtown attractions, arts and entertainment, family-friendly events, and outdoor recreation that add to the area's appeal for both full-time residents and future investors.

From an economic and employment standpoint, the area is anchored by Seymour Johnson Air Force Base, one of Goldsboro's most important institutions, along with workforce training and educational opportunities through Wayne Community College. These assets help support a steady local economy tied to military, healthcare, education, agriculture, retail, and service-related jobs.

Another major draw is Goldsboro's location. The city sits on US 70 with convenient access to the I-40 and I-95 corridors, making it easier to reach larger employment and travel markets while still enjoying a more relaxed setting. Buyers looking for a property that combines utility access, privacy, usable acreage, and a strong regional location will see the value here right away. Whether someone is planning to build now or hold for the future, this tract offers the space, setting, and potential to bring a wide range of visions to life.

The living room features a striking masonry fireplace, vaulted ceilings, and easy access to the deck--perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The spacious kitchen is filled with natural light and offers generous counter space along with a comfortable eat-in dining area, making it ideal for everyday living. An enclosed porch and adjoining patio provide multiple spots to unwind and take in the surrounding natural beauty. The primary suite offers a peaceful retreat designed for comfort and convenience. Additional highlights include storage cabinets and shelving in the garage plus a separate laundry room with an extra storage closet, adding both function and practicality to this well-appointed home. Gas logs are present, but never been used by these owners. Many of the furnishings may be available for purchase separately. Electric is available at the road, and a septic system will be required (buyer to verify soils/permitability).

Enjoy the best of ''close to town, but not in town.'' You're just minutes to Williamston conveniences including shopping, restaurants, schools, medical services, and everyday essentials, while still tucked into a quiet neighborhood setting.

Williamston is the county seat of Martin County and part of North Carolina's Inner Banks region, known for its small-town charm, deep history, and access to outdoor recreation along the Roanoke River. The area also offers a strong community feel with local events, parks, and regional attractions, while benefiting from convenient highway access for commuting.

From an economic standpoint, Williamston's location along key corridors supports steady job activity tied to healthcare, education, manufacturing, agriculture-related business, and local services--plus you're within comfortable driving distance of larger employment and entertainment options in nearby cities like Greenville.

If you've been searching for acreage in an established subdivision with a natural backdrop and easy access to town amenities, 1185 Watercress Rd is a standout opportunity--bring your builder and start planning your next home.

Bring your plans to the wide-open NC coast with this 5.5± acre tract at 301 New Rd in Scranton--a great blend of space, privacy, and practical utilities. The property offers county water and electric available at the road, plus ~116 feet of road frontage for an easy driveway approach and flexible homesite placement. A septic system will be needed, but with 5.5 acres you'll have plenty of room to position a homesite and septic area while still leaving space for a shop, garden, recreational use, or future expansion.

Scranton (Hyde County) is known for its quiet, coastal-country lifestyle--where you can enjoy open skies, low traffic, and room to breathe while still being within reach of everyday conveniences in nearby towns. The area's economy is supported by a mix of agriculture/forestry, commercial fishing and coastal industries, construction, and public services--giving the region steady local roots while remaining a hidden gem for buyers who want land and lifestyle.

For family fun and outdoor recreation, you're close to some of Eastern North Carolina's best natural assets. Lake Mattamuskeet and the surrounding refuge are a major draw for birding, wildlife viewing, fishing, photography, and scenic drives. You're also within reach of additional coastal refuges and waterways that make weekends feel like a getaway--kayaking, boating, and exploring the Inner Banks.

Location-wise, you're positioned for easy day trips: Belhaven and Washington offer waterfront dining, marinas, and small-town charm, while Greenville expands your options with hospitals, universities, shopping, and broader employment. When it's time for sand and salt air, the NC coast and beach destinations are within a reasonable drive for weekend trips--so you can enjoy the shoreline without living in the middle of seasonal crowds.

If you've been looking for usable acreage with utilities available, strong frontage, and the freedom to build the way you want, 301 New Rd deserves a closer look.

Every bedroom is generously sized and includes large walk-in closets, offering storage that is rarely found in homes of this size. With everything conveniently located on one floor, the layout is both practical and comfortable for everyday living.
Step outside and discover over 1,000 square feet of decking -- an incredible outdoor living space that is ideal for entertaining, relaxing, or even adding an above-ground pool. They just do not build homes like this anymore! Listed on the National Historic Registry, the Seaborn M. Shankle house is thought to be the oldest building in Commerce, GA. Located in the Central Business District and zoned Residential/Commercial, this historic home offers a myriad of potential uses. Only an hour from Atlanta via I-85N, convenient to Athens, Lake Hartwell, Lavonia, Braselton and more. The original structure was built by Eli Shankle, one of the first pioneers of the area. He established a trading post and with his wife Rebecca built a two-room cabin c. 1843. In the mid-1870s, their son Seaborn Shankle added the larger Italianate-influenced house around the existing structure. Both the original cabin and the 19th-century addition comprise the existing house you see today. With modern updates, many original details, and a beautiful pool, the next caretaker can easily transition into carrying on the home's legacy. The grand central hallway is flanked by a parlor and dining room, as well as two additional spaces to be utilized as bedrooms or additional living spaces. At the end of the hallway is a spacious, updated bathroom and laundry room. At the rear of the home you'll find the kitchen and walk-in pantry. The natural beauty of the property is further enhanced by the newly added hardscaping by Smith Planning Group, perennial plantings, irrigation system, and pool. A wrap-around porch provides the perfect perch for enjoying the home's surroundings. Upstairs are four bedrooms and a central bathroom with clawfoot tub and access to a Juliet balcony overlooking the rear yard. Shankle House is also known for being the childhood home of the author Olive Ann Burns, famous for her novel Cold Sassy Tree, which she based on characters and stories from her family's time living there. There is so much to love about this property - from the high ceilings, original moldings, hardwood flooring, and pool to the walkable location near restaurants, a brewery, and local parks.

Equestrian property in the heart of Aiken's renowned horse country! Situated on 13.50 acres in the sought-after Pony Express community, this beautifully designed single-level home offers 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and a dedicated office or flex space that can also serve as a guest bedroom. An oversized 2.5-car garage complements the home's modern finishes, while established pasture, paddocks, and access to private riding trails and a community arena complete the equestrian lifestyle.
The thoughtfully crafted 1,855 heated square foot home features 10-foot ceilings and solid wood 8-foot doors, creating an open and elegant feel throughout. The great room is a true showpiece, highlighted by a modern coffered ceiling and custom shiplap accent wall, anchored by a gas fireplace with a reclaimed oak mantle. The kitchen blends beauty and functionality with birchwood cabinetry, leathered granite countertops, and a striking 7½ foot white oak island topped with veined quartz. Additional highlights include a farmhouse porcelain sink, handmade Italian porcelain tile backsplash, custom white oak vent hood, and Cafe six-burner gas range with convection oven. Stainless appliances include a counter-depth refrigerator and an interior stainless steel dishwasher. Oregon wood-wide plank porcelain tile flooring runs seamlessly throughout the main living space, with porcelain tile in the bathrooms and laundry room. The laundry area features butcher block countertops and a utility sink, ideal after a day around the barn. A 12-foot sliding glass door fills the living space with natural light and opens to the surrounding countryside, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. 
Designed with the horse enthusiast in mind, the property features cleared, gently rolling, established pasture with two paddocks (approximately 1.5 acres and 3 acres) and room for additional expansion. The sellers recently installed three- and four-board pressure-treated fencing painted black (2025), creating a classic equestrian aesthetic, along with a covered run-in shed built in 2024 (approximately 12' x 19'6'') with water access.
Additional improvements include two separate 220-volt electrical hookups, providing exceptional versatility for barn equipment, future farm expansion, equestrian amenities, RV, or horse trailer hookups. For added protection and peace of mind, the sellers have installed lightning rod protection on the roof, an especially valuable feature for open acreage and equestrian properties.
Residents of the Pony Express community enjoy access to a community riding arena with irrigated footing, along with dedicated riding trails and equestrian easements reserved exclusively for property owners. Scenic trails wind through mature pines and hardwoods, offering shaded rides and peaceful walks throughout the neighborhood, all set along paved roadways within this beautifully maintained community.
A rare opportunity to own a turnkey equestrian property where thoughtful design, modern comfort, and the Aiken horse-country lifestyle come together, ready for you and your horses to enjoy from day one.

This beautifully appointed home in the sought-after 55+ Del Webb community in Riverlights is a rare find. Positioned on a highly desirable lot and featuring the popular Taft floor plan, this home offers a bright and airy layout with 3 bedrooms and 2 full baths. Among the notable details of this home are tray ceilings, expansive windows, plank flooring, and owner-added solar tubes that illuminate the home with natural daylight. The open design floorplan creates connectivity between the spacious living area, kitchen and dining space. The heart of the home, the kitchen is complete with upgraded granite countertops, tile backsplash, upgraded KitchenAid stainless steel appliances, and upgraded soft-close cabinetry with pull-out drawers. The generous primary suite offers a serene retreat; it includes a large walk-in closet and a bathroom with a double vanity and a spacious walk-in shower. The two additional bedrooms are also spacious and well appointed. One special feature of the home is the fully fenced backyard. The unique positioning of the lot provides serenity and privacy, with the backyard opening to green space on two sides with beautiful views of two ponds. Additional highlights of the home include an inviting sunroom, laundry room cabinets, garage entry drop zone cabinetry, integrated sprinkler system, reverse osmosis water system for the kitchen, RING security, and abundant storage, including a walk-up attic over the garage. Residents of Del Webb enjoy low-maintenance living - with HOA dues covering full lawn care - and resort-style amenities. Amenities include a clubhouse with regular events, indoor and outdoor saltwater pools, a fitness center, tennis, pickleball, bocce, a dog park, walking and biking trails, and a kayak launch. Del Webb is just minutes from downtown Wilmington, the beach, and the various dining, shopping, and entertainment options at Riverlights Marina Village, which is right around the corner. Welcome home!

Stillwater Coves does have a HOA with yearly fees of 650. There is a minimum square footage for building of 1300 and sorry no mobile homes. I refuse to use the word blend. This 50's bungalow has been reimagined for  today's Buyer. The completely redone kitchen has all of todays finishes and yesterday's charm. The arch in the kitchen leads to a bar area and large built in pantry with room for a small bistro table if you desire. The wooden island in the center comes with the home. There is even a small breakfast bar or serving area between the kitchen and dining. The original hardwood floors were carefully refinished and really add to the warmth in the living area. An electric fireplace was added for ambiance in the original non functioning fireplace space. the Primary bedroom has a completely remodeled ensuite bath and a walk in closet. And the hall bath was renovated as well with new tile. When you enter, there is a small office, filled with natural light just outside the foyer. To the rear of the hone is a new deck and privacy fence for outdoor enjoyment. And the mechanicals have been updated as well, including: new HVAC, water heater, electric meter, wiring. The windows are newer as is the moisture barrier.Roof is metal and and has been inspected. Close to downtown and the Truman Pkwy, shopping and schools, this one has it all.

description:

address: 0 1 Pinnacle Shores Dr Peete Far Drive, Macon, NC 27551
description:
Discover the space and freedom to build the lifestyle you want on this 5.62± acre corner tract at Pinnacle Shores Dr & Peete Farm Rd in Macon. With ~570' of road frontage, you'll enjoy standout visibility, easy access, and multiple options for a private homesite set back from the road. The topography is very level and mostly flat, offering ample opportunity for strong build sites and easier planning for driveways, homes, and outbuildings. Electric is available at the road; a well and septic will be needed—ideal for buyers wanting elbow room and a true country setting.

Macon sits in historic Warren County, where deep North Carolina roots and a relaxed rural pace meet the convenience of being within reach of the Triangle. The area is known for its quiet communities, local pride, and access to outdoor recreation—perfect for those who value privacy, land, and room to expand.

From an investment and lifestyle standpoint, Warren County continues to market itself as a place to ''live differently,'' with a growing focus on sustainable economic revitalization and quality-of-life amenities. Whether you're building your primary residence, a weekend getaway, or holding acreage for the future, this location offers a strong blend of peace and accessibility.

Outdoor and family fun is close by with county parks, trails, and recreation options, and you're also well-positioned for lake days and regional exploring. When you're ready for the coast, enjoy the ability to plan day trips to the beaches and the Outer Banks for fishing, dining, and classic Carolina shoreline adventures.

If you've been waiting on a larger homesite with road frontage, utility access, and the flexibility to create your own plan—this one checks the boxes.

Opportunities like this, with generous acreage, utility access, and waterfront appeal, are not easy to come by. Come explore the possibilities and see what makes this Havelock property such a special place to build.

description:

The spacious downstairs primary bedroom suite has a trey ceiling, generous windows and large walk-in closet. The two additional downstairs bedrooms are equally well appointed, have ample closet space and share the hall bathroom. Upstairs, the Finished Room over Garage (FROG) is perfect for an additional bedroom, media room or home office. Other features of this home include unique shiplap trim, stylish lighting, laundry room, 2-car garage, and a newer raised deck - perfect for grilling your favorite meal outside. Welcome Home!

address: Lot 65 Maiden Cane Way, Lincolnton, GA 30817
description: LAKEFRONT and DOCKABLE 1.13 Acre Lot in Providence Ferry!! Lot 65 on Maiden Cane Way.  This lot offers great lake access to walk down to the lake - corps of engineers will allow for a path from your property line down to the lake as well as an underbrush permit.  The lot has been underbrushed throughout the 1.13 acres and there has already been a path cut from the back lot line to the sandy beach suggested dock site.  The water levels in the cove behind the lot are rather deep and has had water behind the lot consistently throughout the year even when lake levels dropped.  This tract is both level and slightly rolling with a small slope towards the lake with mature pine trees and some hardwoods throughout. There are several areas that would allow for a great homesite and with the large acreage it could be as secluded as you would like. From the back of the property you can see the lake through the trees on the right hand side at the corps line. Utilities include electric, water, phone, and high speed internet - will REQUIRE a septic tank (soil report available at the county health dept). Providence Ferry is one of my favorite Lake Communities with extraordinary lake views, great neighbors, close proximity to a boat ramp, RV and boat storage available, community boat dock, community pavilion and tons of green spaces. There is a HOA and Building Restrictions in this lake community, sorry no mobile homes. Come and see this tract of land to build your lake home in Providence Ferry. HOA is 375 annually

address: Lot 27&28 Lakeshore Estates Drive, Lincolnton, GA 30817

This lot is lakefront, but currently zoned not dockable for a private dock, but could be open to consideration for future dockability per the Ranger for this area for the US Army Corps of Engineers.  These two tracts of land boast a combined 1190 +/- feet of lake frontage.  There is no HOA and very minimal restrictions, including the ability to have a mobile home or smaller home (must be at least 600 sq ft).  Utilities available include Electricity, Phone, and fiber optic Internet.  This tract will require a well and septic tank to be installed for water and sewer.  Lakeshore Estates is a quiet and simple lake community on Fishing Creek one of the area's best recreational areas on the north part of the lake and offers a public boat ramp right off of GA HWY 79.

address: 145 Spicer Lake Drive, Holly Ridge, NC 28445
description:
Welcome to 145 Spicer Lake Drive in the gated waterfront community of Summerhouse on Everett Bay, a beautiful 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath coastal cottage offering approximately 2,700± square feet of thoughtfully designed living space. Perfectly positioned with a peaceful pond view in the backyard, this home combines comfort, functionality, and coastal lifestyle. Inside, the main living area features 10-foot ceilings and an open-concept layout that creates a bright and spacious feel from the moment you enter. The great room flows seamlessly into the dining area and a well-appointed kitchen featuring granite countertops, ample cabinetry, and space ideal for entertaining family and friends. 
The first-floor owner's suite is a private retreat with trey ceilings, a large walk-in closet, dual vanities, and a beautifully tiled walk-in shower. A unique and convenient feature is the direct connection from the owner's suite to the laundry room, making everyday living easy. A practical drop zone area adds extra organization for busy households. 
Upstairs, you'll find three generously sized bedrooms, two full bathrooms, and a spacious bonus/game room, along with plenty of walk-in attic storage. The home has been refreshed with new interior paint and brand-new carpeting, making it move-in ready. This community offers an exceptional coastal lifestyle with resort-style amenities including a clubhouse, fitness center, pool, lakes, walking trails, boat launch, day dock, and direct access to the Intracoastal Waterway. Conveniently located between Wilmington and Jacksonville, the community is just minutes from MARSOC, Stone Bay, Camp Lejeune, and approximately 15-20 minutes to the beautiful beaches of Topsail Island and Surf City. If you're looking for a home that blends coastal charm, modern functionality, and resort-style living, this one deserves a closer look.

Prime commercial opportunity located within city limits on a high traffic corridor connecting Highway 74 and Hwy 1 South. Positioned on a corner lot, this property offers excellent visibility and easy access, making it ideal for a variety of business ventures.
This newly renovated 1,300 sq ft space is perfectly suited for a restaurant or café, featuring a drive through window, outdoor patio seating, and available restaurant equipment that can be utilized with an acceptable deposit allowing for a smoother and more cost effective startup or expansion. The layout is functional and inviting, designed to accommodate both dine in and takeout operations.
With strong exposure, convenient access, and turnkey potential, this property is a standout opportunity for entrepreneurs or investors looking to establish a presence in a growing area.

Feel instantly at home as you step into this bright, open residence in Fairfield Harbour, a gated waterfront community just minutes from historic downtown New Bern. The inviting living area is the heart of the home, showcasing a vaulted ceiling, whitewashed masonry fireplace, and stylish board-and-batten accent wall. The well-appointed kitchen overlooks the living and dining spaces and features quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, a breakfast bar, and abundant cabinetry--perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. Unwind in the three-season porch, your private front-row seat to the beauty of nature. The spacious primary suite offers a walk-in closet and tiled step-in shower, while the split-bedroom floor plan ensures comfort and privacy for owners and guests alike. Additional highlights include a separate laundry room, a shed with electricity, and a well pump for exterior spigots. Residents enjoy an impressive array of neighborhood amenities, including an 18-hole golf course, The Pointe restaurant, two marinas, tennis and pickleball courts, a community center, dog park, playground, walking trails, picnic pavilion, fishing pier, boat ramp, and kayak launch. Optional membership at the nearby Broad Creek Recreation Center provides access to indoor and outdoor pools, fitness facilities, and more. Embrace the relaxed coastal lifestyle you've been dreaming of--your next chapter begins here.

2619 Newkirk Avenue presents a rare opportunity to acquire a well-positioned commercial property currently configured as a childcare and educational facility in the heart of Wilmington. Situated on approximately 0.63 acres, this 5,427 +/- square foot building offers exceptional flexibility for a variety of commercial and institutional uses. The existing layout includes multiple classrooms, office and administrative areas, dedicated drop-off and parking areas, and fenced outdoor recreation space, making it ideally suited for continued use as a daycare, preschool, private school, Montessori program, tutoring center, ABA/autism therapy clinic, counseling center, church preschool, pediatric therapy practice, or other educational or professional service use. Property is zoned RB. Located just minutes from Shipyard Boulevard, College Road, Midtown Wilmington, and surrounding residential communities, the property benefits from strong demographics, convenient accessibility, and continued population growth throughout the Wilmington market. With increasing demand for childcare, educational, medical, and community-oriented services in the area, this property offers both owner-users and investors a unique opportunity to acquire a highly adaptable facility in a prime coastal North Carolina location.

Step back in time and discover the charm and history of this unique farmhouse, originally the Yadkin Hill School, before being thoughtfully converted into a home in 1925. As you enter, you're welcomed by beautiful hardwood floors and a warm, inviting layout. The main level features a spacious first-floor primary bedroom along with a second bedroom, offering convenience and flexibility. Just beyond, the formal dining room showcases classic built-in corner cabinets, creating the perfect space for gatherings. The large kitchen offers plenty of room to cook and entertain, complete with a cozy breakfast nook and a convenient laundry area nearby. Upstairs, two additional bedrooms provide space for family, guests, or a home office. Outside, the property truly shines with approximately 20.93 +/- acres of mostly fenced land surrounding the home, ideal for farm animals or recreation. A paved driveway leads to a detached two-car garage, while an attached one-car carport adds additional convenience. Enjoy peaceful country living with your own stocked one-acre pond, perfect for fishing or simply relaxing and taking in the beautiful surroundings.

Discover 53± Wooded Acres on Cartledge Creek Road 
A Rare Rural Opportunity
Tucked just outside the city limits, this exceptional 53± acre tract offers the kind of space, privacy, and possibility that's become increasingly hard to find. Zoned RR, the property opens the door to a wide range of uses such as residential, recreational, agricultural, or investment with the added flexibility to divide into as many as four separate parcels.
A recently thinned pine plantation sets the stage for maximum timber growth and long-term value, while existing skid trails provide a natural head start on an internal road system making access, development, and recreation that much easier from day one. Mature hardwoods and pines blanket the land, creating a private, natural retreat ideal for building your dream home, establishing a family compound, hunting, riding trails, or simply enjoying the quiet of the countryside. Whether you envision a secluded homestead, a weekend escape, or a long-term investment hold, this property delivers the canvas.
Just 10-15 minutes from Rockingham and roughly 10 minutes from Ellerbe, with quick access to Highway 220, the location strikes that ideal balance, peaceful rural living without sacrificing convenience. Properties of this size, character, and flexibility don't come to market often. Schedule your private tour today.

Looking for a lot in the country to build your new home? Check out this property on Beasley Rd Roper, NC. 5.55 wooded acres +/- with 487 feet of road frontage.  Buyer would need a private well and septic. Deed restrictions to be: single family, no manufactured homes (single or doublewides or campers as dwellings), chickens contained to individual lots are ok, one horse per cleared acre (no other livestock), tiny homes, barn homes, modular or site built homes ok. All county rules apply too (including limit on number of dogs & contained to owners yard). No storage of inoperable vehicles or motor craft.

Easy access to Hwy 95 and Hwy 64.  Saddlebrook located just 45 minutes to downtown Raleigh.

Upon entering the home, you'll be greeted by an inviting foyer connecting to a home office, then lead into the center of the home. This open-concept space features a large living room, dining area, and functional kitchen. The kitchen is equipped with a walk-in pantry, stainless steel appliances, and center island with a breakfast bar. Also located on the first floor, located off the living room, is a convenient guest bedroom and full bathroom. 

The Hayden upstairs features a spacious primary bedroom, complete with walk-in closet and primary bathroom with dual vanities. The additional three bedrooms share a third full bathroom. There is an upstairs loft space, perfect for family entertainment, gaming, or a reading area. With its luxurious design the Hayden is the perfect place to call home.

Quality materials and workmanship throughout, with superior attention to detail, plus a one-year builder's warranty and 10-year structural warranty. Your new home also includes our smart home technology package! 

Do not miss this opportunity to make the Hayden yours at Saddlebrook. * Photos are not of actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only. *

address: 4239 Dudleys Grant Drive A, Winterville, NC 28590
mls_brokerage_name: Lee and Harrell Real Estate Professionals
description:
As you open the door, the main level greets you with an open-living layout. The flow is immediate: a spacious living room that seamlessly transitions into the dining and kitchen area. Here, you'd picture a relaxed evening, perhaps a favorite show on, soft lighting, and conversation drifting from the couch to the kitchen.
There's also a half-bath on this level, convenient for guests and everyday life alike.  One of the nicest surprises: just beyond the sliding glass door  there's a private, fenced patio. Your own little outdoor retreat. Mornings with coffee, evenings wind-down, gardening in pots, a secure space for a pet, all within your own walls.
You climb the stairs, and on the second floor you find three bedrooms and two full bathrooms. The layout is one that balances convenience and comfort: each bedroom with its own sense of privacy.
Imagine waking to soft morning light, the quiet of the neighbourhood, and knowing that you're tucked away, but still supremely close to everything: shopping, dining, local life in Winterville and nearby Greenville, NC. Location matters. Here, you're in a setting that lends itself to both convenience and calm. The home is close to major arteries and amenities, a place where run-out errands are easier, and the weekend can mean something spontaneous: lunch downtown, a movie, or a stroll.
For investors, this kind of well-placed property, with manageable maintenance and strong neighborhood appeal holds promise. Picture this: You've just finished moving boxes in. Maybe a small house-warming gathering is scheduled. Kids are playing on the patio, a barbeque is on the way. Sunday morning, you make a quick trip to the nearby market, stop for coffee, and by lunchtime you're back home prepping for game night or an evening out.
This isn't just four walls and a roof, it's a setting for living. For story-making. For the next chapter of your life.

mls_brokerage_name: Anchor & Co. of Eastern North Carolina
description:
Warm, custom-built, and genuinely one of a kind, this waterfront home on Charles Creek in Sneads Ferry commands 115 feet of deep water frontage with expansive views from nearly every room. It is the kind of home that feels special the moment you walk through the door.

A 10,000-pound boat lift puts Chadwick Bay, the Intracoastal Waterway, New River Inlet, and the Atlantic Ocean all within easy reach. The Trex deck and porch offer an ideal setting for entertaining or quiet evenings at the water's edge, and low-maintenance by design, the outdoor spaces were built to be enjoyed, not managed.

The kitchen is appointed with custom cherry cabinetry, granite countertops, and professional-grade JennAir appliances, all positioned to take full advantage of the water views beyond. The home's systems are equally sound, with freshly repainted HardiPlank siding, a roof replaced within the last three years, and dual HVAC units with one recently replaced.

The primary suite is a true retreat, wrapped in windows with beautiful water views, rich hardwood floors, and direct access to the deck. Two walk-in closets provide generous storage, and the en suite bath is finished with dual granite vanities, a jetted soaking tub, and a generous walk-in shower.

The community adds even more to enjoy, with HOA amenities that include a swimming pool, playground, and equestrian facilities.

Properties of this caliber along the Sneads Ferry waterfront are genuinely hard to come by. Contact us today to arrange a private showing.

Welcome to easy, coastal living on Whitemarsh Island. This beautifully maintained townhome offers the perfect blend of low-maintenance convenience and a relaxed waterfront lifestyle.
Featuring a spacious, light-filled layout with 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, the home is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. Step outside to a private backyard framed by mature landscaping, creating a peaceful, tucked away setting that’s perfect for morning coffee or unwinding at the end of the day.
What truly sets this property apart is the lifestyle. Enjoy access to a community dock, ideal for soaking in the coastal scenery, launching a kayak, or catching sunset views over the water. The saltwater pool offers a resort style escape, while the HOA takes care of yard maintenance and trash pick up, allowing for effortless, lock and leave living.
Located in a highly desirable island neighborhood, you’re just minutes to downtown Savannah, Tybee Island, and local dining and shopping making this an ideal full-time residence, second home, or investment opportunity.

Welcome to 0 Ketoma Pass (Lot 20) in Autumn Chase--a 1.88± acre High Country homesite with electric hookups and strong ~254' of road frontage off Bennick Pl, giving you excellent access and flexibility for driveway placement, home orientation, and long-term usability. Well and septic will be required.

This is the kind of tract buyers hunt for: extra acreage for privacy, outdoor living, and a functional build layout--without feeling boxed in. With solid frontage, you'll have more options for a pull-in drive, turn-around, and a clean build presentation from the road, whether you're planning a full-time home or a mountain getaway.

Location is a major advantage. Sugar Grove sits in the heart of the High Country, keeping you close to the charm of Valle Crucis and recreation along the Watauga River, while staying convenient to nearby hubs like Boone and Banner Elk for shopping, dining, medical care, schools, and year-round events. You get the peaceful setting people move to the mountains for--without being far from what you need.

From an economic standpoint, the broader Boone/Watauga County area benefits from steady demand tied to higher education, healthcare, and tourism--supporting long-term growth and consistent activity in the region. For families, you'll love having quick access to outdoor adventures, scenic drives, parks, local eateries, and seasonal attractions that make the High Country such a draw.

If you've been waiting for a tract that checks the big boxes--acreage, road frontage, electric in place, and a prime High Country location--Lot 20 is ready for your vision. Come walk it and start planning your mountain future.

Discover a rare opportunity in the sought-after Riverlights community--this beautifully maintained home sits on a unique lot with an established common area in front and a serene, tree-lined backyard overlooking the lake in the back. Curb appeal abounds with manicured landscaping and a charming rocking chair front porch. Step inside to a welcoming foyer that offers immediate access to a full bath and a versatile bedroom--currently used as a home office--highlighting the home's thoughtful and functional layout. The heart of the home is the open-concept kitchen and living area, featuring a stunning natural gas fireplace framed by custom built-ins. The chef's kitchen is a true standout, featuring upgraded granite countertops, sleek KitchenAid stainless steel appliances, a natural gas stove with a convenient pot filler, a complementing tiled backsplash, and elegant custom glass upper cabinetry. Luxury vinyl plank flooring flows throughout the home, paired with nautical ceiling fans and illuminated trey ceilings with dimmers for a truly coastal lifestyle. The spacious master suite is filled with natural light and offers a spa-inspired bath with a tiled shower, dual vanities, and a custom closet system. Upstairs, two additional bedrooms share a beautifully designed Jack-and-Jill bath, each with its own vanity and a glass-enclosed shower. Enjoy breathtaking lake views from the oversized screened porch, accessed by Florida-style sliding doors. Additional features include a two-car garage with extra storage, whole-house Kinetico water softener with a dedicated drinking tap, MESH system smart home wiring, transfer switch for generator, Graber window treatments, and plantation shutters. Residents of Riverlights enjoy resort-style amenities including a pool, clubhouse, fitness center, kayak launch, lakes, walking trails, dog park, and a new amenity center currently under construction. Ideally located just minutes from downtown Wilmington, area beaches, shopping, and dining.

The Belhaven features 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, 1,991 sq ft. of living space, and a 2-car garage. Upon entering through the front door, you will encounter a Flex Room to the left, before passing by the staircase and powder room. The inviting foyer leads you to the heart of the home, where an open-concept layout encompasses the spacious living room, and a well-appointed kitchen that opens to the patio. The kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances, beautiful quartz countertops, a functional kitchen island, and a corner pantry. 

Making your way upstairs, you'll discover the laundry room straight ahead, with an additional bedroom and primary bedroom to the right. The primary bedroom includes a spacious walk-in closet, walk-in shower, dual vanity, and a water closet for ultimate privacy. On the back of the second floor are two additional bedrooms separated by a full bathroom. With its thoughtful design, expansive layout, and modern features, the Belhaven is the perfect place to call home at Laurel Oaks. Contact us today to schedule your personal tour!

*Pictures are for representational purposes only*

Looking for a place off the beaten path? Ready to trade city lights for a full galaxy of stars in the night sky?  This Carolina farmhouse offers country living in the heart of coastal North Carolinas diverse waterfowl fly zone.  Love fishing? Birdwatching? Photography? Fresh shrimp? We have some of the best in Hyde County!  And hunting too...
