Thoughtfully designed for flexibility, the home offers 6 spacious bedrooms and 4 beautifully appointed baths—perfect for multigenerational living or hosting in style. The main level features a serene primary suite and an additional guest bedroom with full bath, while upstairs boasts generous accommodations plus a versatile sixth bedroom ideal as a media room, lounge, or private retreat. At the heart of the home, the chef’s kitchen impresses with stainless steel appliances, leathered granite countertops, abundant cabinetry, and an oversized island—flowing effortlessly into the dining and living spaces for seamless entertaining. Located in an amenity-rich community just minutes from Richmond Hill’s best dining, shopping, and conveniences, this exceptional home offers the perfect balance of comfort, sophistication, and Southern charm!

mls_brokerage_name: Lee and Harrell Real Estate Professionals
description:
It begins the moment you turn into Carter Ridge--a quiet, welcoming neighborhood where life seems to move at just the right pace. As you pull up to this beautifully upgraded home, there's an immediate sense that this isn't just a place to live... it's a place to settle in and stay awhile.
Step through the front door, and you're greeted by the soft glow of natural light dancing across rich luxury vinyl plank floors that stretch effortlessly from room to room. The space feels open, yet cozy--like it's already waiting for your furniture, your laughter, your everyday moments. Custom built-ins frame the living area, ready to hold your favorite books, photos, and memories yet to be made.
Just beyond, the kitchen draws you in--the true heart of the home. Imagine mornings here with coffee brewing, sunlight pouring over crisp white cabinets and gleaming granite countertops. Stainless steel appliances stand ready for everything from quick breakfasts to holiday feasts, while a generous pantry keeps everything tucked neatly away. And because the kitchen overlooks the living room, you're never far from the conversation, the laughter, or the game on TV.
At the end of the day, the home offers a quiet retreat. The primary suite feels like your own private escape, with space to breathe, unwind, and recharge. The walk-in closet easily holds everything you need, while the ensuite bath invites you to slow down--featuring dual sinks, a walk-in shower, and finishes that bring a touch of spa-like calm to your routine.
Down the hall, three additional bedrooms wait to become whatever you need them to be--guest rooms filled with warmth, a home office buzzing with productivity, or a creative space where ideas come to life.
Out back, the story continues. A covered patio sets the scene for peaceful mornings and relaxed evenings, whether you're sipping coffee as the day begins or unwinding as the sun sets. The fully fenced yard offers privacy and room to play, gather, or simply enjoy the outdoors.
And just beyond your doorstep, you'll find the convenience of nearby restaurants, shops, and entertainment--everything you need, right where you want it.
This isn't just a house in Carter Ridge. It's where comfort meets style, where everyday life feels just a little more special, and where your next chapter is ready to begin.

address: 0 17 N Juniper Berry Ln Lane, Zirconia, NC 28790
description:
Build your mountain homesite in Pinnacle Falls - The Ridge with this 1.93± acre tract on Juniper Berry Ln. The land lays level across the front--ideal for a cleaner driveway approach and easier site planning--then slopes gently toward the back, creating natural privacy and a great setup for outdoor living.

Location is a major win: Zirconia offers a quiet, wooded Henderson County setting while staying close to conveniences in Hendersonville (shopping, dining, medical, and daily needs). You're also within an easy drive to larger hubs like Asheville for expanded employment, dining, healthcare, and entertainment.

Zirconia's local roots trace back to the area's historic mineral activity and long-standing mountain community character--an authentic Western NC setting that still feels tucked away.

Inside Pinnacle Falls, ownership includes access to standout community amenities such as a gated entrance, community lodge, pool and hot tub, fitness/sauna, private paved roads, and a network of hiking trails and waterfall features, with significant preserved green space--perfect for buyers who want a true ''live-in-nature'' lifestyle.

Utilities: community water and electricity are available, giving you a strong head start for building.

If you've been waiting for a tract that balances usable acreage, mountain privacy, and proximity to Hendersonville, Lot 17 is a must-see.

Welcome to 0 Ketoma Pass (Lot 19) in Autumn Chase--a 1.29± acre High Country homesite with electric hookups and exceptional ~330' of road frontage off Bennick Pl, giving you standout access and flexibility for driveway placement, home orientation, and long-term usability. Well and septic will be required.

This is the kind of tract buyers hunt for: enough acreage to create privacy, add outdoor living space, and still keep the homesite functional. With strong frontage, you'll have more options for a pull-in drive, turn-around, and a clean build presentation from the road--great for both full-time living and a mountain getaway.

Location is a major advantage. Sugar Grove sits in the heart of the High Country, keeping you close to the charm of Valle Crucis and the recreation of the Watauga River, while remaining convenient to larger nearby hubs like Boone and Banner Elk for shopping, dining, medical, schools, and year-round events. Whether it's Saturday mornings at local spots, fall festivals, or quick trips for essentials, you're positioned to enjoy the best of the mountains without feeling isolated.

From an economic standpoint, the broader Boone/Watauga County area benefits from steady demand tied to higher education, healthcare, and tourism--supporting long-term growth and consistent activity in the region. For families, you'll love having quick access to outdoor adventures, scenic drives, parks, local eateries, and seasonal attractions that make the High Country such a draw.

If you've been waiting for a tract that checks the big boxes--acreage, road frontage, electric in place, and a prime High Country location--Lot 19 is ready for your vision. Come walk it and start planning your mountain future.

LAKEFRONT w/ Dock Slip 1.30 Acre Lot!! Lot 58 on Lighthouse Pointe in Providence Ferry!! This lot is one that has been assigned a slip in a 6-slip covered dock that is designated for specific lots, it does offer great lake access to walk down to the lake - corps of engineers will allow for a path from your property line down to the lake as well as an underbrush permit. This tract is very level with mature pine trees and some hardwoods through out. There are several areas that would allow for a great homesite and with the large acreage it could be as secluded as you would like. The lot does start to slope back once you get to the corps line / back property line - you can see the lake from your back property line.
 Utilities include electric, water, phone, and high speed internet - will REQUIRE a septic tank. Providence Ferry is one of my favorite Lake Communities with extraordinary lake views, great neighbors, close proximity to a boat ramp, RV and boat storage available, community boat dock, community pavilion and tons of green spaces. There is a HOA and Building Restrictions in this lake community, sorry no mobile homes. Come and see this tract of land to build your lake home in Providence Ferry. HOA is 375 annually per lot

Exceptional best defines this all brick townhome in The Village at Motts Landing, notably Wilmington's most sought-after Smart Retirement neighborhood. Upon entering, you will be captivated by the attention to quality detail that truly sets this home apart, such as hardwood flooring and custom millwork. The spacious living room has a coffered beam ceiling, a built-in bookcase, and a cozy gas fireplace with stone surround. The kitchen boasts granite countertops with complimenting tile backsplash, custom cabinetry, and high-quality stainless appliances. Adjacent to the kitchen, the cheerful dining area offers a tray ceiling and an attractive chandelier. The downstairs primary suite also includes a tray ceiling and two walk-in closets; it is adjoined to its primary bathroom which exemplifies luxury, encompassing an expansive double vanity with generous storage, and a large zero threshold tiled shower with glass doors. Two additional bedrooms - equally well-appointed and sharing the adjoining bathroom - are also on the first level. One of these bedrooms is currently utilized as an efficient home office. A finished room over the garage (4th bedroom) is ideal for a guest quarter and is equipped with its own full bathroom including a tiled shower. One of the prominent features of this home is the enclosed climate-controlled sunroom overlooking the private patio and lush landscaping.  Other important features include a laundry room, abundant storage, 2-car garage, and no city taxes! The neighborhood offers amenities second-to-none including two pools, clubhouses, fitness center, tennis, pickleball, and a putting green. Welcome home!

Perfectly positioned beside the community pool, this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath unit offers the ideal blend of comfort, convenience, and coastal lifestyle living.

One of the standout features is the spacious four-season addition overlooking a peaceful pond with fountain views--creating the perfect spot to relax year-round. Ideal as a primary home, vacation getaway, or investment property!

This 19.33-acre parcel on Reavico Farms Rd in Yadkinville offers a rare opportunity to own a mostly wooded tract with excellent potential and a beautiful natural setting. The front portion of the property features a level layout that may be well suited for a future homesite, while the land gently dips toward the back where a small creek or waterway adds to the character and recreational appeal of the tract. Even with that natural feature, the property is not located in a flood zone, giving buyers added confidence as they plan for future use.

Electricity, water, and septic will be required, making this a great option for someone ready to shape the property around their own vision. Whether you're looking for a private homesite, hunting ground, recreational retreat, or a long-term piece of land to hold in the family, this property offers the kind of flexibility that is getting harder to find. The mostly wooded setting provides privacy, room to roam, and a peaceful backdrop for outdoor enjoyment.

Yadkinville and the surrounding Yadkin County area offer a strong blend of rural charm, community appeal, and long-term value. Buyers are drawn to the area for its scenic countryside, small-town atmosphere, local wineries, outdoor recreation, and family-friendly lifestyle. The location also provides convenient access to larger nearby cities such as Winston-Salem, Statesville, and the broader Triad region, offering a balance of peaceful country living and everyday convenience.

This tract is full of possibilities--build, hunt, explore, invest, or simply enjoy the natural beauty and hold it for the future. With level ground at the front, a gentle dip toward the back, and a small creek or waterway adding character to the land, this is the kind of property that stands out for buyers looking for usable acreage with privacy and potential in Yadkin County.

Peaceful living awaits in this West Athens residence sited on 1.59 acres. Constructed in 2018 by JW York Homes and recently refreshed with interior paint and new carpeting in all bedrooms. While the home is newer, the exterior architecture gives a nod to the stylings of yesteryear, especially with the wraparound front porch. Inside, the layout includes a spacious Primary Suite PLUS an additional bedroom suite with full bathroom on the main floor. Entering through French Doors into the main foyer, a formal dining room is on the right. Staight ahead is the Greatroom with 18ft+ ceiling and fireplace. The kitchen is complete with Quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, breakfast bar, and a bright, cheery breakfast room overlooking the backyard. A covered back porch provides a birds eye view of the private backyard with mature trees, terraced, brick paver patio. The backyard is fully fenced with classic three board ranch rail wooden fencing. Back inside, the Primary Suite is roomy and features a large walk-in closet and ensuite bathroom with double vanity, garden tub, separate shower, and water closet. The upstairs offers additional living space for kiddos, a home office, or media room with the 22x17 bonus room. Additionally, there are three spacious bedrooms, one with a private full bathroom, and one with an attached bathroom that is shared with the final bedroom. With over 3,300 square feet, there is room for all to live comfortably. A drop zone off the kitchen leads to the laundry room and double garage. With this location, you'll be able to enjoy the quiet, stargaze in the backyard without light pollution, but still be convenient to all the great dining, shopping, sporting events, concerts and more that all make Athens a desirable place to live!

A little slice of Eastside paradise — constructed in 2023 by JW York Homes and further customized by the current owners. This home is beautifully maintained and cared for, and to top it off, it has been decorated to the nines. Even better - the sellers are willing to convey any of the yard & home’s contents if desired.

The two story entry foyer and staircase are basked in natural lighting from several second-story windows. A home office to the left is currently utilized as an art studio and is one of the brightest rooms in the home. Moving from the foyer, the side entry hall contains a half-bathroom, storage closet, and laundry closet. An open concept kitchen features tile backsplash, huge island, Quartz Countertops, stainless steel appliances including a new gas stove, and updated lighting package. Upstairs you’ll find two bright guest bedrooms sharing a hall bath. Additionally, the Primary Suite is located at the rear of the home and offers views of the mature trees in the backyard. Both the primary bathroom and walk-in closet are quite spacious.

Located just far enough from town to see the stars at night, but not too far from grocery stores, restaurants, the UGA Veterinary Teaching Hospital, The State Botanical Garden of Georgia, and so much more!

Current zoning of NB (Neighborhood Business) allows for residential - single family. The property consists of three individual 50' x 150' parcels (total acreage of .517). Additionally, the premium site is adjacent to views of Carolina Beach Lake and a short walk to the beachfront. The existing business is relocating and is not for sale. Showing appointments must be scheduled after normal business hours.

Set along W Darden Rd in Clinton, this 5.35-acre vacant lot offers a great opportunity for buyers looking for space, privacy, and a peaceful rural setting. The property is level, wooded, and has access to electricity, with a well and septic system needed. Its long, deep layout gives it a more private, tucked-away feel than a typical homesite, creating the potential for a driveway-style entrance with a future homesite set farther back from the road, subject to county approval, soil suitability, and permitting.
The wooded setting adds to the property's appeal for buyers who enjoy nature, quiet surroundings, and outdoor space. It may work well for a custom home, weekend retreat, recreational use, walking trails, or simply holding land as a long-term investment. The shape of the parcel also creates a natural sense of separation from nearby properties, making it attractive for buyers who want privacy without being completely disconnected from local conveniences.
Clinton and the surrounding Sampson County area offer a strong mix of small-town comfort and practical amenities. Buyers can enjoy access to local shopping, restaurants, schools, healthcare, parks, and community services, while the local economy is supported by agriculture, manufacturing, healthcare, education, retail, logistics, and county government jobs. Clinton's central location also provides access to larger employment and service hubs, including Fayetteville, Goldsboro, Wilmington, and Raleigh.
This property is a strong option for buyers seeking usable acreage, a natural setting, and room to create their own vision in a quiet part of eastern North Carolina. Buyer to verify zoning, utilities, well and septic requirements, soil suitability, permitted uses, and buildability.

description:
Discover the perfect waterfront setting at 98 Shifting Sands Rd in Columbia, NC, a stunning over-half-acre lot on the Albemarle Sound offering breathtaking water views and endless possibilities.Totally Bulkheaded.  Located just 10 minutes from downtown Columbia and less than an hour from the NC Outer Banks, this property blends peaceful coastal living with convenient access to shops, dining, and beaches.
Whether you're dreaming of a custom primary residence, vacation getaway, or retirement home, this lot is ready to bring that vision to life. With a minimum building requirement of 1,500 sq ft, you'll have plenty of room to design a home that fits your lifestyle.
For buyers who love the water, this is truly a dream location--boating, swimming, fishing, and all water-related activities are right outside your door. Enjoy serene mornings on the Sound, vibrant sunsets, and the relaxed pace of waterfront living.
Low HOA dues of just $275 per year make ownership even more appealing. If you've been searching for a rare waterfront opportunity with space, views, sunsets and location, 98 Shifting Sands Rd is a must-see.

address: 2271 Curly Maple Wynd NE, Leland, NC 28451
description: This 3 bedroom, 2 bath home in Compass Pointe offers over 1,600 sq.ft. of heated living space, a 2-car garage, and a glassed-in sunroom with a vaulted ceiling. The sunroom is not heated or cooled, but it provides a bright space to relax while overlooking the back yard. Important updates include a new roof installed in 2020 and a new water heater in 2025. The home is also equipped with a whole-house generator for added convenience during power outages. Inside, wood flooring flows from the foyer into the main living areas, complementing the open floor plan. The horseshoe kitchen features an efficient layout, a hop-up counter ideal for snack time, and an attached breakfast nook for casual dining. The living room includes a built-in bookshelf/ entertainment center that conveys with the sale. Just off the living area is a formal dining room that can also serve as an office or hobby room, depending on your needs. The primary suite features a tray ceiling, double-sink vanity, walk-in shower, garden tub, and linen closet. Two guest bedrooms and a guest bathroom are located at the front of the home, creating privacy for the primary suite. Outside, an oversized patio overlooks a landscaped back yard. Irrigation is installed in both the front and back yards. Compass Pointe offers resort-style amenities (located less than half a mile from this home), including a clubhouse, fitness center, indoor and outdoor pools, lazy river, tennis, pickleball, basketball courts, walking and biking trails, and a kayak and canoe launch. An 18-hole golf course is available with optional membership. Lawn maintenance and irrigation are included in the HOA dues.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home in the desirable Woodlake community! Offering over 2,600 square feet across three levels, this spacious home features a bright, open main floor with a formal dining room, generous living area, and well-appointed kitchen complete with island, pantry, and convenient drop zone off the garage. The second floor includes the primary suite and three additional bedrooms, while the third floor provides a private fifth bedroom with its own full bath--ideal for guests, a bonus room, or home office. Enjoy outdoor living year-round on the screened-in porch overlooking the fully fenced backyard. This home offers comfort, flexibility, and a convenient location with easy access to Fort Bragg, Southern Pines and Pinehurst.

The foyer then opens into the large great room, overlooked by the kitchen. The open-concept layout integrates the great room with the kitchen, featuring stainless steel appliances, spacious center island, and a corner walk-in pantry.

Upstairs, there is the primary bedroom with a private bathroom, dual vanity, and a separate water closet for privacy. The primary bedroom sits at the front of the home on this floor and features a walk-in closet. The additional two bedrooms provide comfort and privacy with access to a full secondary bathroom.

The loft offers a flexible space that can be used as a media room, playroom, or become a fourth bedroom. The laundry room completes the second floor. With its thoughtful design and spacious layout, the Galen is the perfect place to call home.

Make the Galen your new home at East Ridge today!  * Photos are not of actual home or interior features and are representative of floor plan only. *

Discover the potential of this 4.36-acre vacant lot on Hwy 58 S in Kinston, NC 28504. With level terrain, 104 feet of road frontage, and access to electricity and public water, this property offers a strong starting point for a future homesite, private retreat, or investment opportunity, while septic will be needed. What makes this parcel especially appealing is its depth and layout, offering a unique sense of privacy and separation that is hard to find in more typical lots. The shape creates an excellent opportunity for a homesite near the front while still enjoying additional space and a more secluded feel as the land extends back.

Situated in a good neighborhood, this property offers the balance of peaceful surroundings and convenient access to everyday needs. Kinston provides grocery stores, restaurants, schools, medical care, and local shopping, along with a revitalized downtown, arts scene, and growing small-business community. Family amenities in the area include parks, youth sports, nearby boat access, and outdoor recreation opportunities along the Neuse River, giving buyers plenty to enjoy beyond the property itself.

From an economic standpoint, Kinston benefits from a diverse local economy supported by manufacturing, agriculture, healthcare, education, and regional services. Major employers and job opportunities can be found through UNC Health Lenoir, local industries, public schools, and businesses throughout Lenoir County and surrounding areas. The location also keeps you within reach of larger hubs like Greenville, Goldsboro, and New Bern, with Raleigh accessible for expanded shopping, dining, and employment opportunities.

For buyers seeking more than just a standard homesite, this property stands out with its flexible layout, level land, utility access, and private feel. Whether you envision building, holding for the future, or creating your own quiet retreat with room to spread out, this Kinston parcel is well worth a closer look.

One of Greenville's most iconic luxury estates is now available. This stately Georgian-style executive home is set on 1.8 private, landscaped acres in the heart of Greenville, offering over 6,200 square feet, a private tennis court and exceptional outdoor living framed by brick privacy walls and wrought iron gates.
From the moment you arrive via the circular drive, this grand estate makes a lasting impression. Step through double front doors into a dramatic two-story foyer with gleaming hardwood floors, flanked by a private home office/study and an elegant formal living room which is perfect for entertaining, game nights, or a billiards space. A formal dining room with an expansive bay window creates the ideal setting for hosting and holiday gatherings.
The fully renovated chef's kitchen is the centerpiece of the home, featuring a stunning nine-foot quartz island, Wolf Gas Range, custom finishes and a bright breakfast nook. The kitchen opens seamlessly into a spacious family room and an extraordinary 35x25 sunroom with cathedral ceilings, fireplace and walls of arched windows, flooding the home with natural light and offering the ultimate indoor-outdoor lifestyle.
The first-floor primary suite is a true retreat, complete with a custom walk-in closet and a spa-inspired luxury bath. Upstairs offers four additional bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a bonus room with skylights, and a walk-in attic, providing flexible space for guests, recreation, or multigenerational living.
Designed for both luxury living and entertaining, this private estate offers rare amenities including a tennis court, expansive grounds and timeless architectural detail throughout. Properties of this size, caliber, and location in Greenville are rarely available.
Experience luxury, space, and privacy in one of Eastern North Carolina's most sought-after locations. This is more than a home, it's a signature property.
